name: Tomatillo Squash Bisque
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan, heat oil and butter over medium heat.
2. Add garlic and onions; sauté until softened.
3. Add squash, chiles, and tomatillos; stir until coated and heated through.
4. Add chicken broth; bring to a boil. Cover and simmer for about 20 minutes or until squash is tender.
5. Tear or shred tortillas into pieces and add to soup mixture. Stir in lime juice and cilantro leaves.
6. Blend the soup in batches using a blender or food processor until pureed and smooth. Return to saucepan.
7. Heat through, then season with salt and pepper to taste.
8. Serve hot, accompanied by a dollop of sour cream and crumbled tortilla chips and additional chopped cilantro leaves. If desired, thin the soup with more chicken broth.
